title: gelasia pygmaea
intro: Gelasia pygmaea is a type of flowering plant, also known as the Pygmy Gelasia, which belongs to the family of Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Gelasia pygmaea include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Gelasia pygmaea is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
